_comment: Tier-2 for dealii dg_transport#: walks every *.h file under $CONDA_PREFIX/include/deal.II and asserts (a) all 26 catalog-referenced C++ symbols (SolverCG/GMRES/MinRes, Precondition{Jacobi,SSOR,ILU,Identity,Chebyshev}, FE_{Q,DGQ,Nedelec,RaviartThomas}, GridGenerator, AffineConstraints, MappingQ, VectorTools, DataOut, KellyErrorEstimator, SparseDirectUMFPACK, MGTransferMatrixFree, MeshWorker, parallel::distributed::Triangulation) are declared in at least one header, (b) the catalog-typo 'interpolate_difference' is NOT declared anywhere, (c) the real 'integrate_difference' IS declared. Catalog falsification #27 (dg_transport.py L340 had 'VectorTools::interpolate_difference' which doesn't exist) was found via the new dealii_source_scanner.py header walk. Verified against deal.II 9.1.1 in /home/hermann/miniconda3/envs/ofa-dealii on 2026-06-01.
